allow: Bash(powershell -NoProfile -Command 'Get-ChildItem -Path '\\''C:\\'\\'' -Recurse -Filter '\\''AuthContext.tsx'\\'' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue -Force | Where-Object { $_.FullName -notmatch '\\''node_modules'\\'' } | ForEach-Object { $hasAC = Select-String -Path $_.FullName -Pattern '\\''activeCompany'\\'' -SimpleMatch -Quiet -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; [PSCustomObject]@{ Path=$_.FullName; Modified=$_.LastWriteTime; HasMultiCompany=$hasAC } } | Sort-Object Modified -Descending | Format-Table -AutoSize -Wrap')
